message: I couldn't tell if my eyes were open or closed.
A world without light.
There was light.
When my eyes focused, I saw that I was within a faint light.

name: Hasaki
message: "This isn't... my ceiling."
I jumped up and checked my surroundings.
Oh, that's right. I'm okay.
I'd been staying here at the bar since yesterday.

name: Hasaki
message: "What time is it?"
I would normally be able to tell the time of day from the sun streaming in through the window, but in this darkness, I couldn't tell at all.
I looked at the clock. It was just after 9 a.m.
The bar's interior is always dark, even during the day.
According to Master, the walls and doors are thick so that gang members can't break in.
Bars where gangs would gather used to be built with unusually heavy walls and doors to protect against break-ins.
But of course, that only happens in other countries.
In a way, the bar is a lot safer than the house.
When the doors are locked, no one can come in, and no one can see in from outside.

name: Hasaki
message: "Huh?"
Did I just hear someone... knock?
I can't imagine any customers coming at this time of day.

name: Kimura
message: "Are you up?"
I stood in front of the large door.
I raised my voice a little to answer.

name: Hasaki
message: "Is that you, Kimura-san?"

name: Kimura
message: "Yeah, it's me, Kimura. The demon Kimura, the Journalist Esquire Kimura."

name: Hasaki
message: "What's that?"

name: Kimura
message: "There have been a lot of new happenings. I got some valuable new info."

name: Hasaki
message: "You investigated some more?"

name: Kimura
message: "Yeah, I haven't slept at all! Isn't that amazing? Let me in!"
What should I do? Master told me not to let anyone in until he got back, but...

name: Hasaki
message: "Well, okay..."

name: Kimura
message: "Good morning, Hasaki-chan."

name: Hasaki
message: "You're awfully chipper."

name: Kimura
message: "That's because I haven't slept!"

name: Kimura
message: "Oh, can I have a beer? Whiskey, please!"

name: Hasaki
message: "We're not open yet..."
I reluctantly stood at the counter, even though I usually work back in the kitchen.

name: Hasaki
message: "Have you eaten yet?"

name: Kimura
message: "Nope! Can you cook, Hasaki-chan?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Well, the only cooking I've done is here at the bar..."

name: Kimura
message: "Yay."

name: Hasaki
message: "What do you want? This is the menu."

name: Kimura
message: "Let's see... Pickled Celery, a Penne all'Arrabbiata, a Margarita Pizza, and..."

name: Hasaki
message: "Um, we're out of celery. We haven't restocked yet."

name: Kimura
message: "Then a Whiskey...
aged 1000 years!"

name: Hasaki
message: "We don't have any whiskey like that..."

name: Kimura
message: "Ten years, then."

name: Kimura
message: "Puhaa, you're a good cook, Hasaki-chan. It tastes great."

name: Hasaki
message: "Thank you."

name: Kimura
message: "Oh, and I need a refill. A Glenfarclas from the year one billion!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Are you okay? You're bright red."

name: Kimura
message: "Have I fallen for you?"

name: Hasaki
message: "...Jeez."

name: Kimura
message: "Ahahahaha, did your heart skip a beat? Are you intoxicated with my adult charm?"

name: Hasaki
message: "I think you're the one who's intoxicated... Oh, behind you."

name: Kimura
message: "Behind me?"

name: Master
message: "Why did you let Kimura in?"

name: Hasaki
message: "He said he found some new information..."

name: Master
message: "Don't let him fool you like that. You're so careless."

name: Hasaki
message: "What are you doing? Are you looking for something?"

name: Master
message: "Huh? I'm taking the money out of his wallet before I throw him out."

name: Hasaki
message: "You can't rip people off like that!"

name: Master
message: "So what's this new information you were talking about?"

name: Kimura
message: "It's amazing. You'll understand what a great journalist I am now."

name: Master
message: "Oh, you don't have to convince me. You're a perfect example of mass media scum. Truly, you are a real journalist... and that's not a compliment."

name: Kimura
message: "That's right, I'm a true journalist. Don't you agree?"

name: Master
message: "Yeah, I got it. Now what's this new information?"

name: Kimura
message: "Well... I was looking around online, and there were posts saying something was happening around the station in Suginomiya, so I went out to Suginomiya."

name: Master
message: "And?"

name: Kimura
message: "Suginomiya is where that girl committed suicide, so I stood watch at that apartment building... and I saw two girls there."

name: Master
message: "Hmm... And?"

name: Kimura
message: "They picked something up and took it home."

name: Master
message: "...How is that new information?"

name: Kimura
message: "First of all... those two girls were Kita High students."

name: Master
message: "But why should we care about this amazing new information of yours?"

name: Kimura
message: "Those two girls... are Akasaka Megu and Kitami Satoko."

name: Master
message: "And?"

name: Kimura
message: "Those two were the students who were bullying the girl who committed suicide, Takashima Zakuro."

name: Master
message: "What proof do you have of that?"

name: Kimura
message: "Well, I was originally investigating the proliferation of illegal drugs. Several Kita High students' names came up."

name: Kimura
message: "These two girls came up in my investigations more than once, so I already investigated them."

name: Kimura
message: "There was an incident in the past which could've resulted from bullying on Kita High's Building C."

name: Master
message: "Hmm... What does that mean?"

name: Kimura
message: "Amazing!"

name: Master
message: "What is?"

name: Kimura
message: "I'm amazing for finding all this out!"

name: Master
message: "You're not amazing. You don't know anything."

name: Kimura
message: "What are you talking about?! You can't solve a mystery in one day! It takes time!"

name: Master
message: "Then tell us when you've solved it all. We don't care if you found a new clue."

name: Kimura
message: "B-But it was really hard to gather all this information!"

name: Master
message: "But that's your job..."

name: Kimura
message: "It's my job, but I haven't slept at all! I'm working twenty-four hours overtime!"

name: Master
message: "You're proud because you're not getting any sleep? Are you stupid? You're not gonna get laid if you keep talking like that, you know?"

name: Kimura
message: "What does that have to do with it?!"

name: Master
message: "Everyone knows that it's just annoying if you tell them about how little sleep you get. Popular guys don't talk about that stuff."

name: Kimura
message: "I'm an exception!"

name: Master
message: "...What kind of exception would that be?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Do you have a girlfriend, Kimura-san?"

name: Kimura
message: "Ahaha... I've decided to preserve my chastity until we start dating, Hasaki-chan."

name: Kimura
message: "That hurt..."

name: Master
message: "You're over thirty and you're still a virgin..."

name: Kimura
message: "Why?! I'm such a perfect, nice, hardworking, funny guy!"

name: Master
message: "Then how did you stay a virgin this long?"

name: Kimura
message: "That's because... I was waiting for the moment I met you, Hasaki-chan."

name: Master
message: "Don't give her that romantic spiel. I know you go to the titty bars in town."

name: Kimura
message: "Um, Master, please don't hit me every time I say something. I was just making a joke..."

name: Master
message: "Your face didn't look like you were joking."

name: Kimura
message: "You're so cruel..."

name: Kimura
message: "What do you think, Hasaki-chan?"

name: Hasaki
message: "A-About what?"

name: Kimura
message: "About me! About my humor!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Um... You're a lot of trouble..."

name: Kimura
message: "Huh? How so?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Oh, uh, I guess I get kind of tired of hearing you make bad jokes over and over..."

name: Kimura
message: "Really? I guess you're right. I always go overboard trying to make people laugh, you know.
Ahahahaha."

name: Hasaki
message: "Y-You really shouldn't..."

name: Kimura
message: "So what do you think of me as a man?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Uh, I think you're a lot of trouble..."

name: Kimura
message: "Oh, I know that I'm a lot of trouble. I'm always getting into trouble!"

name: Master
message: "I think you have a different definition of trouble than the rest of us."

name: Kimura
message: "Doesn't that mean I'm amazing? So, what else do you think of me? Don't you like me?"

name: Hasaki
message: "I don't know you well enough for that."

name: Kimura
message: "Then maybe we can get to know each other better?"

name: Master
message: "No way. Hasaki-chan already likes someone else."

name: Hasaki
message: "Huh?"

name: Kimura
message: "What? Really? Who is it?"

name: Master
message: "About that..."

name: Hasaki
message: "W-W-Wait! Oh, that's right! You need to go to the store, Master! Quick!"

name: Master
message: "Oh, I can do that later tonight."

name: Hasaki
message: "Um, you know, Kimura-san!"

name: Kimura
message: "Huh? What?"

name: Hasaki
message: "We're closed! Go home!"

name: Master
message: "We haven't even opened yet."

name: Hasaki
message: "That's right! So get out!"

name: Kimura
message: "Wh-Wh-Wh-Wha..."

name: Hasaki
message: "Master!"

name: Master
message: "Ahaha, sorry, sorry."

name: Hasaki
message: "Jeez, don't say weird stuff like that!"

name: Master
message: "Oh, it was just a joke. Or is there really someone you like?"

name: Hasaki
message: "N-Not... at all."

name: Hasaki
message: "I-I'm going to the store!"

name: Master
message: "Huh? But the store isn't..."

name: Hasaki
message: "I'll be back soon!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Haa, haa, haa..."
Why does this all have to happen right in the morning?
I looked at the clock. It was just before eleven.
I said I was going to the store, but then I realized that the store wouldn't open till noon.

name: Hasaki
message: "What should I do?"
I brought the shop's wallet with me too. If I went back without buying anything, I would just look dumb.
Oh well...
I haven't gone to see her in a few days. Maybe I should check in on her.
White Lotus Apartments...
I didn't really want to come here.
My other relatives have even told me to stay away from her.
But I come to the apartment here every few days.
The person who abandoned me...
The person who denied my existence...
That's who lives here.
So... I won't abandon her.
And of course, that's not because I love her or even because I'm a philanthropist.
The person who abandoned me...
If I abandoned her after she became powerless, I would be no different.
I hate her.
But her blood runs through my veins.
And I don't want to do the same thing she did.
I won't abandon her.
She abandoned me, but... I won't abandon her.
Because...

name: Hasaki
message: "Tomo Nii-san... was the same way."
Tomo Nii-san hated our mother more than anyone.
He tried to protect me.
But even Tomo Nii-san couldn't truly hate her in the end.
He couldn't throw her away.
That's how she ended up like this.
And even now...

name: Hasaki
message: "Hahaha... You're such a coward, Tomo Nii-san."

name: Hasaki
message: "You always said you were gonna kill her, but in the end, you could never do it."

name: Hasaki
message: "If you couldn't do it, then how could I?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Tomo Nii-san..."

name: Kimura
message: "Hm? Who's Tomo Nii-san?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Huh? Aahh!"

name: Kimura
message: "Is that Tomo Nii-san guy the person you like? Does one of your friends have a cute big brother?"

name: Kimura
message: "Does that mean you really do like older guys?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Why are you here?!"

name: Kimura
message: "Because I was worried. I chased after you."

name: Hasaki
message: "You mean you followed me?"

name: Kimura
message: "Come on... Who knows what could happen, right? A weak, young girl like you needs a big, strong bodyguard like me."

name: Hasaki
message: "Oh, really? So you'll be my bodyguard, huh?"

name: Kimura
message: "Of course!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Hold out your hand."

name: Kimura
message: "Huh? What? You want to hold hands? Or can you read palms?"
I grabbed his hand.

name: Kimura
message: "Gyoah, gyah!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Now, try to escape."

name: Kimura
message: "O-Ouch... I-I can't! It hurts! Let me go!"
I sighed and let his arm go.

name: Hasaki
message: "If you can't even escape a weak, young girl's armlock, I don't think you could protect me."

name: Kimura
message: "N-No... I'm the cultured type of guy. I'm not all that strong or good at sports, but I'm really good at other things, like not sleeping."
I wonder what his problem is.
I looked at Kimura-san's face once more.
He had a huge grin on his face.
But, I guess he's not a bad person.
And he gives us the information he finds. It must've been hard to get all that info.
Part of it is just because he wants to get information from us, I'm sure. Still, he always tells us everything, even if he doesn't have to.
Even now, he could have just followed me instead of showing his face.
And more than anything...

name: Hasaki
message: "Master seems to be pretty fond of you, doesn't he?"

name: Kimura
message: "Master? What? No, I'm not into guys. I only have eyes for you, Hasaki-chan."
Is he even listening to what I'm saying? Or maybe he just doesn't understand what he's hearing.
But wouldn't it be a problem if a reporter was so bad at listening?

name: Hasaki
message: "Haa... Anyway, please don't follow me like that."

name: Kimura
message: "Ahahaha... Sorry."

name: Hasaki
message: "Haa... Well, now that you came all this way... Do you remember that Web Bot Project I told you about last night? Do you want to see it?"

name: Kimura
message: "Huh? Here?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Yes. This is my mother's apartment."

name: Kimura
message: "Oh, wow... The name is exactly the same."

name: Hasaki
message: "Yes, but the White Lotus Association tells her not to use their name. They even sent us a cease and desist order."

name: Kimura
message: "Oh, then she's not related to the White Lotus Association?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Not at all. There's only the name left. Now, only my mother lives here, and the only person who ever comes to see her is the home helper."

name: Kimura
message: "But you come to see her too."

name: Hasaki
message: "I am her daughter, unfortunately..."

name: Hasaki
message: "Go ahead."

name: Kimura
message: "Ahaha, thank you..."

name: Kimura
message: "Whoa."

name: Hasaki
message: "Oh, that's my mother."

name: Kimura
message: "Oh, you're Hasaki-chan's mom? Uh, my name is Kimura!"

name: Hasaki
message: "That's pointless. No matter what you say to her, she can't hear you."

name: Kimura
message: "She can't hear me?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Yes."
Kimura-san looked into my mother's face.
Even when a complete stranger was staring her in the face, she didn't react at all.
Kimura continued his bizarre performance in front of my mother for a few seconds before he was finally convinced.

name: Hasaki
message: "She's been like this for over seven years now."

name: Kimura
message: "Seven years..."

name: Hasaki
message: "Do you want some tea, Kimura-san?"

name: Kimura
message: "Oh, you don't have to do that for me."

name: Hasaki
message: "Um, do you want cold oolong tea or warm green tea?"

name: Kimura
message: "Um, whichever one's easier for you."

name: Hasaki
message: "Are you taking notes?"

name: Kimura
message: "Yeah, sorta. So then, what exactly happened seven years ago?"

name: Hasaki
message: "I can't tell you that."

name: Kimura
message: "Huh? Why?"

name: Hasaki
message: "You're taking notes because you want to write an article about this, right?"

name: Kimura
message: "Not at all. I would consider your family's circumstances before doing that."

name: Hasaki
message: "Either way, I don't want to talk about it. Go investigate it yourself if you really want to know."

name: Kimura
message: "Ahaha, that's a bit harsh. Well, I don't blame you."

name: Hasaki
message: "Kimura-san, it was Nii-san... It was Takuji Nii-san you were investigating, right?"

name: Kimura
message: "Yeah. At first, I was just following the leads, but he caught my interest after his name kept popping up."

name: Hasaki
message: "What did you think of him?"

name: Kimura
message: "What do you mean?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Don't answer my question with another question. Just answer the question."

name: Kimura
message: "Hmm, well... It's hard to sum it up in a single sentence. I talked to him quite a few times, and he broke my camera twice."

name: Kimura
message: "To be honest, it doesn't feel like he's really a central figure in the recent events. Or rather, I don't want to believe he's involved in all this. Maybe that's it?"

name: Kimura
message: "The Mamiya Takuji I met was certainly violent and even a bit ruthless, but..."

name: Hasaki
message: "But?"

name: Kimura
message: "Does anyone ever come to visit this apartment?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Huh? No, not really. What does that have to do with it?"

name: Kimura
message: "The floor was vibrating just now. I think someone's coming up the steps."

name: Hasaki
message: "You heard someone?"
Kimura pointed to a strange machine.
It was a small machine with a cord that reached the floor.

name: Hasaki
message: "What's that?"

name: Kimura
message: "A vibration monitor. Normally, it's used to check for broken parts in machines, but you can use it to tell when someone comes into a building by watching the readout."

name: Hasaki
message: "It's that sensitive?"

name: Kimura
message: "Well, it depends on the construction of the house too, but in a steel-frame apartment building like this, it's pretty accurate."

name: Hasaki
message: "That's awfully convenient, isn't it?"

name: Kimura
message: "Let me ask you again. Do people ever come to visit here?"

name: Hasaki
message: "A maid comes to clean the apartment once a day, but..."

name: Kimura
message: "What time is that?"

name: Hasaki
message: "That's during the evening."

name: Kimura
message: "Are you expecting visitors at this time of day?"

name: Hasaki
message: "No."

name: Kimura
message: "Who could it be?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Relatives, maybe? But I think they would be working today, since it's a weekday."

name: Kimura
message: "Maybe someone else in the industry is trailing me. Or maybe it's a snake who tracked us down online?"

name: Hasaki
message: "What should we do?"

name: Kimura
message: "I'll go check."

name: Hasaki
message: "You can't do that. How would I explain that if it was one of my relatives?"

name: Kimura
message: "What if it's someone dangerous?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Would you be able to do anything?"

name: Kimura
message: "Of course. For your sake, I'll make the impossible possible!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Please just hide."

name: Kimura
message: "Huh? Why? Isn't this the part where we kiss?"

name: Hasaki
message: "It would be dangerous if you went out, no matter who it is, so please just hide. Here, take this knife."

name: Kimura
message: "Whoa... Is this a sashimi knife? I'm pretty sure the tip will break off if you stab someone with one of these."

name: Hasaki
message: "Just go hide already. I'm going out!"

name: Kimura
message: "Whoa, wait!"
I pushed him into the closet.
Now, what's happening outside?
I peered through the peephole and looked out.
Whoever it was, they weren't standing outside the door. I didn't see anyone out there.
And besides, I'm not sure if Kimura-san was right about someone coming up the stairs.
I locked the door with the chain and then opened it a little bit so I could see outside.

name: Hasaki
message: "Huh?"
I unlocked the door right away.
Nii-san was standing outside.
Only Tomo Nii-san and the first Yuki-san knew about the White Lotus Apartments.
Which meant it had to be one of those two.

name: Hasaki
message: "Wh-Why are you here?"
I was too happy to say anything else.
But then I recovered my composure.
There was no guarantee that the person before me was actually who I thought it was.
I closed the door right away.
Almost immediately.

name: Mamiya
message: "S-Sorry... I-I'm not a burglar or anything."

name: Hasaki
message: "Wh-Who are you right now?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Huh?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Who are you?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Um, my name is Minakami, you see..."

name: Hasaki
message: "Minakami... Yuki..."
Yuki-san...
But the way she's talking... This isn't the same Yuki-san.
This Yuki-san doesn't know who I am.
But I heard that the other Yuki-san had replaced me with two characters called Kagami and Tsukasa.
That Yuki-san shouldn't see me for who I am.
What's going on?

name: Hasaki
message: "Ah, ahaha... Minakami Yuki? You're the Minakami Yuki from Kita High, right?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Y-Yes... Wait, how did you know?"
I knew it. This isn't the same Yuki-san I know.
Then why doesn't she think I'm the twin sisters?

name: Hasaki
message: "U-Um, what did you come here for, Yuki-san?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Oh, nothing... Um..."
I was at a loss for words. If nothing else, I could be sure this wasn't the same Yuki-san I knew.

name: Hasaki
message: "Do you want to come in?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Huh?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Do you want to come in... to the house?"
Mom and Kimura-san were inside.
Kimura-san was hiding, so he wouldn't be a problem.
There was no need to hide my mother. Maybe I could even tell what sort of person this Yuki is from her reaction when she sees her.

name: Mamiya
message: "Well, I guess, if I wouldn't be a bother."

name: Hasaki
message: "You won't be."
She stepped into the apartment.
Tomo Nii-san always scowled when he stepped into this apartment.
Then he would always look at our mother from afar.
For some reason, Yuki-san would always pat me on the head after she saw my mother there.
How will this person react?

name: Hasaki
message: "What would you like to drink?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Oh, don't worry about me."

name: Hasaki
message: "Does oolong tea sound fine?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Oh, sure."
I made some oolong tea for Nii-san.
It was the first time I had ever needed to act so polite around my brother.
Takuji Nii-san couldn't see me. Tomo Nii-san and the previous Yuki-san both talked to me like a normal sibling would.
But the new Yuki-san always saw me as two twin girls I've never heard of.
So this was new for me.

name: Mamiya
message: "But before that, could I ask why you know my name?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Sorry. You're right. That was a little creepy, wasn't it?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Oh, no, that's not what I mean."

name: Hasaki
message: "My name is Mamiya Hasaki."

name: Mamiya
message: "Mamiya Hasaki... Huh? Mamiya?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Yes. He's in your class."

name: Mamiya
message: "Mamiya Takuji..."

name: Hasaki
message: "Takuji is my father."

name: Mamiya
message: "Huh?"
I couldn't tell how much she actually knew about me, so I gave her a completely ridiculous answer.
Just like Yuki-san taught me.
When someone asks you a question, giving a nonsensical answer allows you to understand something about that person, such as how well they know themselves.
The slower they are to react, the less they know about themselves.
It's strange using a technique on Yuki-san... that I originally learned from Yuki-san.

name: Mamiya
message: "That's..."

name: Hasaki
message: "It was a joke."

name: Mamiya
message: "Oh, riiight. Wait, a joke?!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Takuji is my husband."

name: Mamiya
message: "Huh?!"

name: Hasaki
message: "That was also a joke."

name: Mamiya
message: "No... Enough with that, already."

name: Hasaki
message: "Excuse me."

name: Hasaki
message: "I just thought it would help break the ice."

name: Mamiya
message: "No, well... You don't have to worry about me."

name: Hasaki
message: "Excuse me."
It seemed like a joke Yuki-san would have told, but the new Yuki-san didn't find it funny.
It was painfully clear that this wasn't the same Yuki-san I knew.

name: Hasaki
message: "The truth is... I'm Mamiya Takuji's little sister."

name: Mamiya
message: "Little sister?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Yes."
She apparently recognized me, but she didn't even know that I was his sister.
I couldn't tell if this was the new Yuki-san I heard about, or yet another Yuki-san that had just been created.
It was hard to tell.
I heard the sound of a cup falling in the other room.
My mother must've knocked over the tea I made for Kimura-san...

name: Hasaki
message: "Ah... Mother."
I grabbed some tissues and wiped up the oolong tea she spilled.
Maybe I should've told Kimura-san to take his cup with him.
It would've been kind of weird though, seeing him with a knife in one hand and a cup of tea in the other.
I saw Yuki-san peering in from the other room.
When she saw my mother, there wasn't any sign of recognition on her face.

name: Hasaki
message: "Ah, excuse me. My mom just..."

name: Mamiya
message: "Your mother, you said..."

name: Hasaki
message: "Yes. You can probably tell by looking. Our mother is a bit..."

name: Mamiya
message: "Is she sick?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Yes."

name: Hasaki
message: "More importantly, why are you here at this house, Yuki-san? Even Nii-san doesn't come here."

name: Mamiya
message: "Ah, sorry. I came after I saw this."
She showed me some pages she had printed out.
And then I understood what happened.
This Yuki-san must have been investigating the incidents at Kita High.
And she followed the clues until she ended up here.
After that, I talked with Yuki-san a lot.
As I did, I gradually figured something out.
She must have recognized me as Mamiya Takuji's little sister when she saw me in this house because that made her worldview consistent.
It would be a problem if the twins showed up here.
So at least for now, she recognized me as Mamiya Hasaki.
But she still saw me as a complete stranger. As Mamiya Takuji's little sister.
That was really sad, but I was still glad that I was able to talk to Yuki-san again.
It felt like I was talking to the same old Yuki-san.
She was trying to solve the problem just like the old Yuki-san would have.
How ironic.
She had to uncover the mystery of all these incidents being caused by someone living in the same body as her.

name: Mamiya
message: "Sorry for taking up your time like this."

name: Hasaki
message: "Oh, no. It's not a big deal."

name: Mamiya
message: "Well then..."

name: Mamiya
message: "Yes?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Ah... excuse me. It's nothing."

name: Mamiya
message: "Hmm?"

name: Hasaki
message: "If something's ever troubling you, please come here any time."

name: Mamiya
message: "Sure thing."

name: Hasaki
message: "And if you meet my brother, tell him his little sister asked him to stop by once in a while. We're all waiting for him."

name: Mamiya
message: "You haven't seen your brother lately?"

name: Hasaki
message: "No. It seems like I can't."

name: Hasaki
message: "That's probably part of the curse."

name: Mamiya
message: "Curse?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Oh, it's nothing."

name: Mamiya
message: "Anyway, if I see him, I'll tell him what you said."

name: Mamiya
message: "Look, I know it might not be my place to say this, but I don't think it's anything like that."

name: Hasaki
message: "Huh?"

name: Mamiya
message: "After all, Hasaki-chan, I can't imagine anyone who wouldn't want to have a cute little sister like you. So I'm sure he hasn't forgotten about you."

name: Hasaki
message: "Um, Yuki..."

name: Mamiya
message: "Yes?"

name: Hasaki
message: "You have a childhood friend, right? Two of them, actually."

name: Mamiya
message: "Oh, yeah. The Wakatsuki sisters."

name: Hasaki
message: "Do you like them?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Huh? What's this, all of a sudden?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Oh, nothing... Uh..."

name: Mamiya
message: "Of course I like them. They've been my friends since we were little."

name: Hasaki
message: "Okay."

name: Hasaki
message: "Thank you."

name: Mamiya
message: "Yeah. See you."

name: Hasaki
message: "Bye."
I wish I could tell Yuki-san everything.
But I know that would be pointless.
Because the old Yuki-san that knew everything got erased, and this one replaced her.
If I told this new Yuki-san everything, so she could understand it all... the result would be the same.
The new Yuki-san would be erased too.

name: Kimura
message: "That was Mamiya Takuji, right?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Yes."
I expected a barrage of questions to follow, but for some reason, Kimura-san just looked out the window with a pained expression.
He must have heard us talking from inside the closet, but he didn't ask any more questions about it.
All he said was...

name: Kimura
message: "Even if something big does go down, I don't think your big brother will be to blame."

name: Kimura
message: "That's what I think. And I'm sure you believe in him, too."
That's all.
My conversation with Yuki must have sounded odd, but he didn't question me about it.

name: Hasaki
message: "Something big, huh..."
Kimura-san was trying not to intrude on our lives too much.
But still, even I could feel that something big was about to happen.
It seemed inevitable by that point.
Which means...

name: Hasaki
message: "My brother is related to all this, isn't he?"
Kimura-san was lost for words.
He didn't have any response to that.
That's right. Something else is going to happen soon.
It's going to happen, whether I want it to or not.
And I can't do anything about it.
All I can do is be protected by others. I can't solve the problem.
Seven years have passed. Can't I change this destiny?

name: Kimura
message: "Are you thinking about doing something?"
Kimura-san suddenly looked at me and asked that.
I couldn't answer.
All I could do was grimace in resignation.

name: Kimura
message: "I've fallen into your brother's clutches more than once. I couldn't believe how strong he was."

name: Kimura
message: "He looks skinny, but it's like he can tell what you're going to do before you do it. He made me look like a helpless little kid."

name: Kimura
message: "I was really impressed."

name: Kimura
message: "But he's always careful that he doesn't seriously injure anyone. It hurt like hell, but he was careful not to break my bones or anything. It was only a few minutes before the pain went away."

name: Kimura
message: "They say that strength is kindness. I agree, but today I realized that real kindness is found in dedication."

name: Hasaki
message: "Kindness is dedication?"

name: Kimura
message: "Ahaha... It's kind of cliche to say that strength is kindness, but you probably haven't heard anyone say that kindness is dedication, right?"

name: Hasaki
message: "I haven't."

name: Kimura
message: "All too often, kindness is a transient thing. Showing kindness for just a moment isn't kindness at all. At best, it's pity."

name: Hasaki
message: "Transient kindness is just pity?"

name: Kimura
message: "A transient kindness doesn't involve any pain, sacrifice, or risk."

name: Kimura
message: "It's not in just one moment, but over a great span of time, that kindness is really shown. Even if it might not benefit the person giving their kindness, they still persevere for someone else's sake. That's true kindness."

name: Hasaki
message: "Persevering for someone else's sake is true kindness..."

name: Kimura
message: "It's very easy to say some kind words on cue, which might make other people think you're a kind person."

name: Kimura
message: "But those are actually the people who are least kind."

name: Kimura
message: "Flatterers are the worst of friends. Their empty promises mean nothing when you find yourself in real trouble."

name: Kimura
message: "Those who are willing to risk misfortune falling upon themselves to aid a friend... They're easily much kinder."

name: Kimura
message: "When he attacked me, he could've done much worse to me, and he could've used more of his moves on me."

name: Kimura
message: "He was careful not to leave any bruises, and above all, he treated me like a person."

name: Kimura
message: "Not as a paparazzo or an annoying journalist. He treated me like an equal. Maybe that's not the smartest thing to do nowadays, though."

name: Kimura
message: "Your big brother... is a really nice guy."

name: Kimura
message: "He even risked himself to get those drugs off the street."

name: Kimura
message: "That signals absolute confidence in one's ability. And most of all, he places other people's comfort over his own."

name: Kimura
message: "No one thanks him for what he does. He only does what he thinks is good."

name: Kimura
message: "And it's his stubborn will that keeps him going."

name: Kimura
message: "It's that same stubborn human will that underlies all real kindness."

name: Kimura
message: "A determination to see things through to the end."

name: Hasaki
message: "I don't really understand what you're trying to say."

name: Kimura
message: "You used the same skills on me, and that's when I knew that you two really were brother and sister."

name: Kimura
message: "Your brother is very strong, yet also very caring. You're strong and caring just like he is."

name: Hasaki
message: "You're just flattering me. I'm not strong, and I'm not a nice person either."

name: Kimura
message: "Yeah, that might be true. Even now, your resolve is wavering."

name: Hasaki
message: "Wavering?"

name: Kimura
message: "You're fighting against your own determination to see things through."

name: Hasaki
message: "Against my own... determination?"

name: Kimura
message: "In the past few years, since that great change seven years ago, what thoughts have you had?"

name: Kimura
message: "You've resolved to do something in that time, haven't you?"

name: Hasaki
message: "H-How did you..."

name: Kimura
message: "No, I'm just going off my intuition. I just had a feeling."

name: Kimura
message: "Something happened seven years ago, didn't it? It must be the reason why your mother acts like that."

name: Kimura
message: "And now you're trying to accomplish something."

name: Hasaki
message: "Something I've tried to accomplish..."

name: Kimura
message: "You know what I mean. But your determination is wavering."

name: Kimura
message: "This whole incident might end up being bad news for you, but it'll be worse if you don't do something about it."

name: Hasaki
message: "Worse?"

name: Kimura
message: "Yeah. You probably don't have to worry about the world actually ending, but there certainly could be a bad outcome."

name: Kimura
message: "I've been investigating this incident. It would be a huge scoop if I could report on it."

name: Kimura
message: "But I'd rather it didn't turn into a terrible accident."

name: Hasaki
message: "Thank you."

name: Hasaki
message: "Um... Why did you come to the school?"

name: Kimura
message: "Well, I heard there was a mystery here at Kita High. Nothing ventured, nothing gained.
There's an old Japanese phrase: 'You can't find a tiger cub without going into the tiger den!'"

name: Hasaki
message: "Haa... This is completely unrelated, but can I ask you a question?"

name: Kimura
message: "Anything!"

name: Hasaki
message: "In that old phrase about the tiger, do you know why someone would want to find a tiger cub? Do they want one as a pet?"

name: Kimura
message: "I'm not sure. Tiger furs are really valuable, right?"

name: Hasaki
message: "You would kidnap a tiger cub just for money? You really are a bad person."

name: Kimura
message: "I'm not a bad person!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Well, it's not like you're actually going to do it."

name: Hasaki
message: "But won't you get reported to the authorities if someone sees you going into the high school?"

name: Kimura
message: "It's okay."
Kimura-san walked into the school with me.

name: Kimura
message: "Whoa!"

name: Teacher
message: "You there! Wait a second!"

name: Kimura
message: "I-I'm not a bad person!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Ahaha... I knew you weren't allowed in here."

name: Teacher
message: "Hey, wait!"

name: Hasaki
message: "What are you trying to do?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Kimura-san!"

name: Kimura
message: "I-I was scared. He would've dragged me all the way into the staff room."

name: Hasaki
message: "Of course they would. Someone like you really sticks out in the school."

name: Kimura
message: "Why? Don't I have a baby face?"

name: Hasaki
message: "That's not what I'm saying... That camera is really suspicious."

name: Kimura
message: "Maybe I should've put on a uniform..."

name: Hasaki
message: "I don't think that's the real problem either."

name: Hasaki
message: "Besides, what are you trying to investigate?"

name: Kimura
message: "Well, you know, there's more activity on the underground message board when your brother is at school."

name: Kimura
message: "And when he's at home, there's no activity at all."

name: Hasaki
message: "So you think my brother is somehow related to that message board?"

name: Kimura
message: "Well, yeah, I guess so."

name: Hasaki
message: "You're not very sure of yourself."

name: Kimura
message: "Not really..."

name: Hasaki
message: "Tell me everything. Don't hold back."

name: Hasaki
message: "If there's a way to stop the disaster that's about to happen, I have to know everything."

name: Kimura
message: "Everything... Okay."
Kimura-san took a moment to think and then opened his mouth to speak.

name: Kimura
message: "It was yesterday. Somewhere by that same apartment building in Suginomiya, Akasaka Megu and Kitami Satoko found something. That's what they said."

name: Hasaki
message: "So that's why you were there in Suginomiya. Because you read online that something was going to happen there..."

name: Kimura
message: "Yeah... To tell the truth, I was watching your brother before that."

name: Kimura
message: "They said they found something, but your brother actually planted it there right before they came."

name: Hasaki
message: "I see. That really is important information."

name: Kimura
message: "Yeah, but I wasn't sure if I should tell you all of that. That's why I hid that part."

name: Kimura
message: "I was trailing him because of what he had done before. It was just a coincidence that I saw him plant that."

name: Kimura
message: "I'm probably the only person who knows. No one online knows about that."

name: Hasaki
message: "He's trying to make something happen... That's what you think, right?"

name: Kimura
message: "Yeah. Sorry, but that's what I really think. This whole incident doesn't just happen to revolve around him. He's the one causing these things to happen."

name: Kimura
message: "He's doing it all..."

name: Hasaki
message: "Kimura-san, you should take a look at his computer."

name: Kimura
message: "His computer? The one in the house?"

name: Hasaki
message: "No, there's probably nothing on that one. I'm talking about the other computer, the one he keeps in his secret base."

name: Kimura
message: "He has another one?"

name: Hasaki
message: "The manager of the Kita High underground message board is probably Takuji Nii-san."

name: Kimura
message: "I see."

name: Hasaki
message: "So you're not even surprised. That's what you were thinking too."

name: Kimura
message: "Well, I was watching him for quite a while. But do you know where that computer is?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Yes. I've never been there, but I'm pretty sure I know where it is."

name: Kimura
message: "Then we should sneak in there tonight."

name: Hasaki
message: "We don't have to wait till then. It should fine for us to go right now."

name: Kimura
message: "Well, I would love to go right now, but the school authorities really don't seem too fond of me."
That was putting it mildly.

name: Hasaki
message: "We don't have to go through the school to get there."

name: Kimura
message: "Oh, really?"

name: Kimura
message: "I-Is it really down here?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Yes, it should be just ahead."

name: Kimura
message: "But this is..."

name: Kimura
message: "A sewer, isn't it?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Yes, that's right. Oh, here it is."

name: Kimura
message: "Here?"

name: Kimura
message: "What is this room?"

name: Hasaki
message: "It was the pool's water tank, I think."

name: Kimura
message: "The water tank? There's no water in here, though."

name: Hasaki
message: "It's the tank for the old pool that doesn't get used anymore. Now then..."

name: Kimura
message: "Ah, Hasaki-chan!"

name: Kimura
message: "Wh-What is this?"

name: Hasaki
message: "What does it look like?"

name: Kimura
message: "The foundation... Why is there such a large foundation under this school?"

name: Hasaki
message: "I'm surprised too. The foundation is really massive."

name: Kimura
message: "So this is the first time you've seen it too, Hasaki? How did you know this was here?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Tomo Nii-san said... Oh, uh, I mean Nii-san told me about it."

name: Kimura
message: "I see."

name: Kimura
message: "Oh, is this a generator?
Wow, this secret base is really something."

name: Hasaki
message: "I turned on the electricity."

name: Kimura
message: "It looks like there's a light over there."
There was a slight luminescence over where Kimura-san was pointing.

name: Hasaki
message: "Huh?!"

name: Kimura
message: "Wh-What?"
I grabbed Kimura-san and hid behind the pillar.

name: Kimura
message: "Wh-What, you finally got me alone?"

name: Hasaki
message: "He's here."

name: Kimura
message: "Your brother?"
In the center of the foundation, there was a silhouette of a person looking at the ceiling.
I couldn't see his face, but I knew it had to be Nii-san.

name: Kimura
message: "Oh, you're right. That could be bad. He probably noticed us when we turned on the light."

name: Hasaki
message: "No, it should be fine."

name: Kimura
message: "Will it? Wouldn't he notice if the lights suddenly came on in the dark?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Just look at him. He's not moving at all."
He was still standing in exactly the same position, looking up at the ceiling.

name: Hasaki
message: "I've seen him in that state more than once before. Right now he probably isn't receptive to any information from the outside world."

name: Kimura
message: "He isn't receptive to any information?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Yes, so I think we'll be okay."

name: Kimura
message: "Really? B-But..."

name: Hasaki
message: "Anyway, we should go check it out. Follow me. It's over here."

name: Kimura
message: "Ah, Hasaki-chan..."

name: Kimura
message: "W-Wow, what is this?"

name: Hasaki
message: "I think it's my brother's secret base."

name: Kimura
message: "A secret base, huh? This is amazing... Oh, here's the computer."

name: Hasaki
message: "He's probably getting on the Internet from this computer too. He hardly touches the one at home."

name: Kimura
message: "Oh, lucky! He doesn't have a password on here. Uh, Hasaki-chan, can you just give me a second here?"
Kimura-san pulled out a thumb drive and stuck it into the USB port.

name: Kimura
message: "Just a second. I just need to copy some of these files."
Kimura-san sat down in front of my brother's computer.
And I looked around at Nii-san's secret room for the first time.

name: Hasaki
message: "Books... Lots of books."
There were dusty shelves on the wall, filled with all sorts of difficult books.
Those books belonged to Yuki-san and Tomo Nii-san. Why were they all here?
Oh, that's right... I think Nii-san did say that he kept losing his books before he could finish them.

name: Hasaki
message: "No wonder..."
Maybe Takuji Nii-san hid these difficult books here because he doesn't like them.
He's quite the nuisance for Yuki-san and Tomo Nii-san, though.
I looked at the other shelves too. There were a bunch of manga and light novels cleanly arranged on most of the other shelves.
These must be Takuji Nii-san's...

name: Hasaki
message: "He used to read all sorts of hard books before."
I guess that's his way of distancing himself from his past.
It used to be Tomo Nii-san that didn't like to read hard books.
I guess it was probably Yuki-san's influence that made him start reading more.
Because Tomo Nii-san really liked Yuki-san...

name: Hasaki
message: "Huh?!"

name: Kimura
message: "A cell phone? Huh?"

name: Hasaki
message: "It's not mine. It's probably Nii-san's."

name: Kimura
message: "Your brother's phone?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Let's go. He's going to wake up soon."

name: Kimura
message: "Wait, really? Uh..."
Kimura-san shut down the computer and pulled out his USB drive.

name: Hasaki
message: "Hurry!"

name: Kimura
message: "Y-Yeah..."
I saw the silhouette move to look at the ringing phone.
We could still get away without being noticed.

name: Hasaki
message: "Kimura-san, hurry."

name: Kimura
message: "Y-Yeah."

name: Hasaki
message: "Haa, haa, haa, haa..."

name: Kimura
message: "So this is where it leads. Wow..."

name: Hasaki
message: "Kimura-san, we need to hide. We can't be seen inside the school."

name: Kimura
message: "Sure."
Kimura-san and I hid in the brush.
If we just followed the hedge row, we could get all the way over to the school's back fence without being seen.

name: Hasaki
message: "Kimura-san, hurry up!"

name: Kimura
message: "Wait a second!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Huh?"

name: Kimura
message: "Your brother came out of the manhole."

name: Hasaki
message: "He did?"
He had come out of the underground base too.
He looked like he was worried about something.
Did something happen?

name: Kimura
message: "Is something bothering him?"

name: Kimura
message: "Ah."

name: Hasaki
message: "Someone's here."
We hid and watched.
There were quite a few students gathered around my brother.
He looked like he was shocked at the number of people.

name: Kimura
message: "They're surrounding him. What's going on?"

name: Kimura
message: "That's Akasaka Megu, and that's Kitami Satoko. And that one is... Tachibana Kimika, I think."

name: Hasaki
message: "You know them, huh?"

name: Kimura
message: "I investigated a whole bunch of them. I know the names and faces of quite a few students in this school."

name: Kimika
message: "U-Um, Mamiya-sama..."

name: Kimika
message: "I-I saw it..."

name: Takuji
message: "N-No... Th-This is..."

name: Kimika
message: "Mrs. Senagawa really died! I was so moved! Your power did it, my savior!"

name: Kimika
message: "I was waiting in the courtyard, just like you ordered me to... and Mrs. Senagawa really fell. She splattered all over the ground."

name: Takuji
message: "Wh-What?"

name: Kimika
message: "It was the rooftop above the fourth floor, so she fell from five stories up. I didn't think that was high enough to kill someone outright, but she just went splat."

name: Kimika
message: "Yes. You specified the time and location, didn't you?"

name: Takuji
message: "R-Really?"
Kimura-san and I were at a loss for words.
That meant that another person had died here at this school.

name: Kimura
message: "Th-This is bad. We need to get away from the school."

name: Hasaki
message: "Huh? Oh, right."
I was confused and didn't know what to say.
Another person had died.
And according to the conversation just now, my brother had predicted that person would die.
Which means...

name: Kimura
message: "Hasaki-chan! I know this is scary, but we have to get out of here!"

name: Kimura
message: "Someone just died here. If we're found loitering around the crime scene, we could be mistaken for the perpetrators."

name: Kimura
message: "Come on!"
He pulled my hand as we ran around the backside of the school and went to hop over the back fence.

name: Kimura
message: "Hasaki-chan, hurry up!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Y-Yeah."
I hopped over the fence too.
Then, right when we came out into the alley behind the school...

name: Teacher
message: "Hey, you! Why were you in there?!"

name: Kimura
message: "Eek!"

name: Teacher
message: "You're that guy from earlier!"

name: Kimura
message: "R-Run away!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Y-Yeah!"

name: Master
message: "And then?"

name: Kimura
message: "They saw my face."

name: Master
message: "Careless."

name: Master
message: "So basically, the school and the police think that you're the most suspicious person."

name: Kimura
message: "I-I didn't do anything!"

name: Master
message: "Tell that to the police."

name: Kimura
message: "I can't tell them that!"

name: Master
message: "Don't worry about it. They'll investigate you for a few days, and then it'll be over."

name: Kimura
message: "You can only say that because you've never experienced it. You don't know how scary it is to be interrogated by the police!"

name: Master
message: "Of course I haven't experienced that. It happens to you because you're so careless."

name: Kimura
message: "Oh god, do you think there will be wanted posters up tomorrow? Ones with my face on them?"

name: Master
message: "Well, it's not like we know this person was murdered. All you know is that they died."

name: Kimura
message: "That's true, but..."

name: Master
message: "Besides, there's nothing on the news. If they thought it was a homicide, they would be covering it on the news, don't you think?"

name: Kimura
message: "I-I guess so."

name: Master
message: "Haa... I can't believe another person has died at that school."

name: Kimura
message: "Yeah. What the hell is going on?"

name: Hasaki
message: "How much information did you get off Nii-san's computer?"

name: Kimura
message: "I won't know until I take a look at it. For what it's worth, I copied all his passwords and all the data from the message boards."

name: Kimura
message: "Most of the stuff on his computer was just stupid videos, but it wasn't hard to find the work data."

name: Hasaki
message: "Um, here."
I handed a key to Kimura-san.

name: Kimura
message: "What's this?"

name: Hasaki
message: "The key to the house. It's the spare, though."

name: Kimura
message: "Why did you give me this?"

name: Hasaki
message: "There's another computer in the house. You should investigate that one too."

name: Kimura
message: "Huh? Me? Are you sure?"

name: Master
message: "Of course she's sure. It's not like you can betray us now. You're in more trouble than any of us."

name: Hasaki
message: "And besides, I don't know anything about computers, so I wouldn't know what I was looking at. If you know what you're looking for, then you should go."

name: Kimura
message: "Oh, uh, that should help me out a lot. Thanks."

name: Hasaki
message: "And, uh... Kimura-san."

name: Kimura
message: "What?"
The words were stuck in my throat.
But it was too late to be hiding things now.

name: Kimura
message: "What's wrong?"

name: Hasaki
message: "If Nii-san comes home and tells you that his name is Tomosane..."

name: Kimura
message: "Yeah, I understand. If he says his name is Tomosane, then bring him here, right?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Huh?"

name: Kimura
message: "I couldn't believe it myself, but I think I know what the situation is."

name: Kimura
message: "The brother you love is the one called Tomosane, right?"

name: Kimura
message: "That arrogant, brutish sort of guy, right?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Y-Yeah..."

name: Kimura
message: "Understood. If he comes home, then I'll bring him to you here."

name: Hasaki
message: "Thank you."

name: Master
message: "Hmm?"

name: Kimura
message: "What's so funny?"

name: Master
message: "I'm just surprised that you're such a good man."

name: Kimura
message: "Me?
Oh, come on. You don't need to state the obvious."

name: Master
message: "Now I just want to... eat you up!"

name: Kimura
message: "No, stop it!"
